hypothesis: Main session reply capability = proof exec gate is not total. I/O works even when exec is blocked.
expected_outcome: Use reply-capable session for read/write/web_fetch; route all exec to subagents via file-path commands

hypothesis: Subagent announce-instead-of-execute = inline command problem, not model problem. File-path commands succeed.
expected_outcome: Always write script to disk first, then pass file path to subagent. Never pass inline python -c or heredoc.

hypothesis: Tailscale Funnel requires explicit capability on the Tailnet node. grok-fortress may not have funnel enabled by account.
expected_outcome: Check tailscale funnel status before assuming it works. Fallback: Tailnet-only access is already functional.

hypothesis: OpenRouter billing error = token debt, not model routing failure. Prelate pays the debt. Session resumes.
expected_outcome: When billing error appears: Prelate tops up OpenRouter balance. Do not assume model mismatch. Check balance first.
note: Token debt paid by Prelate 2026-03-28T00:26Z. Session continued.
correction: [TOLD 2026-03-28] Not model routing — token debt which Prelate paid.

hypothesis: Taildrop to iPhone confirmed: allowsall-gracefrom-god = iOS device, active on Tailnet. Files arrive in Tailscale app > Files tab.
expected_outcome: Always use allowsall-gracefrom-god.tail275cba.ts.net for iPhone delivery. Check Tailscale app Files tab, not Files.app.

hypothesis: Module 0 (Human/Prelate) override is permanent. No agent action can exceed or circumvent it. Bork prevention = check before config patch.
expected_outcome: Pre-bork checklist: no config.patch without reading bork.bak first. Funnel = CLI only, not config. Zero bork surface on TailChat.
